The room was reasonably clean, though we noticed some dust on the window ledge and the bathroom could have been fresher. The pool was adequate and the gym had basic equipment that served its purpose. Staff were polite but not particularly memorable — service was professional but unremarkable.

Cleanliness was acceptable in the room and lobby, meeting minimum expectations without going above and beyond. The on-site restaurant offered standard fare, and the business center was functional. The front desk handled our check-in efficiently, though staff seemed too busy to offer much personal attention.

Our room was clean enough for a comfortable stay, though the hallway carpets showed some wear. The swimming pool was decent, and the exercise room had sufficient equipment for a basic workout. Service was adequate — staff were courteous when approached but didn't go out of their way.

The bathroom was clean but the fixtures felt dated, and the room itself was tidy but unremarkable. The hot tub was a nice touch, though the gym was smaller than expected. Staff handled our requests competently, but the overall service felt routine rather than exceptional.

Cleanliness standards were satisfactory — the room was presentable and common areas were maintained to an average level. The on-site cafe was convenient, and the gift shop had a limited but decent selection. Service was fine, with staff being professional if somewhat impersonal.

The lobby was clean and presentable, and our room was adequately maintained during our stay. The pool area was functional, though it lacked the ambiance of higher-end hotels, and the fitness center was basic. Staff were helpful when we asked questions but didn't proactively anticipate needs.

Our room met basic cleanliness expectations, though the bathroom grout could use attention. The restaurant served acceptable food at reasonable prices, and the business center covered our basic needs. The front desk staff were competent and polite, handling our stay without any issues.

The hotel was generally clean, with the lobby looking presentable and our room being tidy upon arrival. The swimming pool was average in size, and the exercise room was adequate for light workouts. Service was standard — nothing to complain about, but nothing that particularly impressed us either.

Room cleanliness was decent, though housekeeping occasionally missed small details like replacing the soap dispenser. The spa offered basic treatments, and the pool was usable but not particularly inviting. Staff were professional in their interactions, though wait times at the front desk were sometimes long.

The hallways were clean and the room was acceptable, though the bathroom shower had some limescale buildup. The gym equipment functioned properly, and the on-site restaurant was convenient for quick meals. Service was adequate — staff did their jobs without issues but lacked the warmth we've experienced elsewhere.

Cleanliness was middle-of-the-road — the room was tidy but felt like it could have used a deeper clean. The pool and hot tub were available and functional, though maintenance seemed overdue. Staff were polite and handled basic requests well, but the service wasn't particularly attentive.

Our room was clean on the surface, though we found a few hairs near the bathroom drain. The business center and gift shop were convenient amenities that served their purpose. Check-in was smooth enough, and the staff were cordial without being particularly engaging or helpful.

The lobby was well-kept and our room was presentable, meeting our basic expectations for cleanliness. The fitness center had enough equipment for a morning routine, and the restaurant breakfast was decent. Service was unremarkable — staff were professional but the experience felt transactional.

Cleanliness was fine overall, with the room and bathroom being acceptably maintained throughout our stay. The pool was open and functional, and the exercise room served its purpose. Staff were available and responsive to direct requests, though they didn't offer much beyond the basics.

The room was adequately clean and the common areas were maintained at a reasonable standard. The on-site cafe was a convenient amenity, and the gift shop carried some interesting items. Service from the front desk was efficient, though the housekeeping schedule was a bit inconsistent.

Our bathroom was acceptably clean, and the room was tidy enough for a comfortable few nights. The swimming pool was average, and the gym could use some updated equipment. Staff were pleasant when approached and handled our requests without delay, though the service lacked personality.

The hotel maintained basic cleanliness standards throughout, with nothing particularly concerning. The restaurant and business center were functional amenities that added convenience. Service was standard fare — check-in was efficient, housekeeping was regular, and staff were polite but not especially warm.

Room cleanliness was satisfactory, and the lobby was always presentable during our stay. The hot tub and pool area were usable, though the gym felt cramped. Service from the staff was professional and adequate, handling our needs competently without any standout moments.

The hallways and room were reasonably clean, though we'd rate it average compared to other hotels at this price. The fitness center and on-site dining options were acceptable amenities. Staff interactions were pleasant enough — everyone was polite and the service got the job done.

Cleanliness met our expectations without exceeding them — the room was tidy and the bathroom functional. The pool was open and maintained at a basic level, and the gift shop was a nice convenience. Service was standard, with friendly but unremarkable staff who handled our stay smoothly.
